title: cyclosorus praetervisus
intro: Cyclosorus praetervisus is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Asian region, where it is valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The medicinal properties of Cyclosorus praetervisus include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus praetervisus, such as infusions and decoctions, are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, and are also used as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions.
